tasks.title: Explore the Dream Engine and Diálogos System

notes: Completed: Successfully built the Dream Engine with 6 tests covering: dream generation, pattern identification, insight recombination, morning reports, and between-session processing. All tests pass.

tasks.title: Integrate Dream Engine into Palace System
tasks.description: Add Dream Engine exports to src/palace/index.ts and create integration between Dream Engine and Memory Palace for automated dream generation from room data.
notes: Completed: Successfully integrated Dream Engine into Palace system. All 456 tests pass. Demonstrated dream generation, pattern discovery, insight recombination, and morning reports. The Dream Engine now works in the gaps between sessions.
